data.body: Consideration (adversarial review): [Conflicting Assumptions] `continue-on-error: true` converts step failure to job success at the check-context level. A required status check that has continue-on-error is theatrical — real failures pass. The rollout sequence MUST be: (1) ship the job WITHOUT continue-on-error AND not in the Ruleset's required list; (2) observe failures and file fix-bug tickets; (3) once green, add to the Ruleset's required list via fc8b-aab0. The same constraint applies to 792b-eb80's matrix legs if currently red.
